halftime_context.rebound_edge: CHA led 23-15 at half and held structural OREB advantage throughout

on_off_tool_audit.summary: ON/OFF tool misidentified Knueppel and Embiid rebound paths, but correctly supported Miller as the cleaner rebound-over profile.
hits: Brandon Miller over 5.5 rebounds cashed with 8
misses: Knueppel rebound under was invalidated by role/minute stability plus game-long board volume
Embiid over failed despite scoring role because rebound share was siphoned by Paul George and Maxey on long-miss environment
Live CHA -8.5 failed because Philadelphia shotmaking variance flipped the game despite CHA rebound dominance

patch_recommendations: Add wing-long-miss rebound escalation when opponent launches 50+ threes or game projects high perimeter volume
Downgrade center rebound overs when co-star forwards/guards show elevated glass share and offense is pull-up heavy
Add live spread caution when team owns rebound edge but opponent shooting efficiency remains elite

model_grade.summary: Poor read overall; only Miller rebound over held. ON/OFF signal required stronger separation between true anchor and false-trap reads.
